title: Lust, Magic, and the Witches' Sabbath
original_title: Lust, Magic, and the Witches' Sabbath
overview: When young Morrigan (Morrigan Thompson) moves away from home for a change of scenery, she never could have imagined the drastic turn her life would take. All roads soon lead to Lust, Magic and the Witches' Sabbath. A sexy satanic bloodbath from the team that brought you "Babezilla vs. the Zombie Whorde"!
